Annotation Interface HighlightParameters

@Documented @Retention(RUNTIME) public @interface HighlightParameters
Since:
4.0
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch, Haibo Liu

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String
    boundaryChars
     
    int
    boundaryMaxScan
     
    String
    boundaryScanner
     
    String

    String

    only used for Highlights.

    String

    int

    only used for HighlightFields.
    int
    fragmentSize

  • Element Details

    • boundaryChars

      String boundaryChars
      Default:
      ""

    • boundaryMaxScan

      int boundaryMaxScan
      Default:
      -1

    • boundaryScanner

      String boundaryScanner
      Default:
      ""

    • boundaryScannerLocale

      String boundaryScannerLocale
      Default:
      ""

    • encoder

      String encoder
      only used for Highlights.
      Default:
      ""

    • forceSource

      boolean forceSource
      Default:
      false

    • fragmenter

      String fragmenter
      Default:
      ""

    • fragmentOffset

      int fragmentOffset
      only used for HighlightFields.
      Default:
      -1

    • fragmentSize

      int fragmentSize
      Default:
      -1

    • matchedFields

      String[] matchedFields
      only used for HighlightFields.
      Default:
      {}

    • noMatchSize

      int noMatchSize
      Default:
      -1

    • numberOfFragments

      int numberOfFragments
      Default:
      -1

    • highlightQuery

      Query highlightQuery
      Default:
      @org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.annotations.Query

    • order

      String order
      Default:
      ""

    • phraseLimit

      int phraseLimit
      Default:
      -1

    • preTags

      String[] preTags
      Default:
      {}

    • postTags

      String[] postTags
      Default:
      {}

    • requireFieldMatch

      boolean requireFieldMatch
      Default:
      true

    • tagsSchema

      String tagsSchema
      only used for Highlights.
      Default:
      ""

    • type

      String type
      Default:
      ""
